Name: ATTINY1626-SU
Purpose: Main microcontroller for measurement processing, control logic, and LCD driving

Name: BC857A-DIO
Purpose: PNP transistor used for switching/control in the circuit

Name: LM324DT
Purpose: Operational amplifier for analog signal conditioning in the sensing circuit

Name: HC-SR04
Purpose: Donor ultrasonic module used as a source of the transmitter and receiver transducers

Name: MC14543BDG
Purpose: BCD to 7-segment LCD driver ICs for the display digits

Name: DE 117-TS-20/7,5/V
Purpose: 3-digit LCD display for showing the measured distance

Name: TACT switch
Purpose: Tactile push buttons for user input and testing

Name: VG18035A
Purpose: DC power connector for 5 V input

Name: 100 nF ceramic capacitor
Purpose: Decoupling and supply filtering capacitors for the circuit

Name: 1 kOhm resistor
Purpose: General-purpose resistor for signal/control biasing in the circuit

Name: 5 kOhm potentiometer
Purpose: Adjustment and calibration of the analog sensing circuit

Name: Terminal 2-pin
Purpose: Terminal for external 5 V power connection
